_nws_comment: Optional NWS forecast view for KEY3 mode. Leave either field blank to disable.
_canned_reply_location_comment: Used in open-mesh canned replies, scheduled test messages, and manual mesh test TX view.
_broadcast_daily_max_comment: 0=silent, 1-3 open-channel replies per day. Also adjustable with KEY1 button on the HAT.
_scheduled_test_enabled_comment: When true, send one scheduled open-mesh test per ISO week with week-of-year placeholder text, plus holiday tests for New Year, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and Christmas, and reply with a short thank-you if someone acknowledges it.
_serial_port_comment: Optional — remove this and 'serial_port' to auto-detect. T-190 = /dev/ttyACM0, Heltec Wireless Paper = /dev/ttyUSB0
_pihole_comment: Pi-hole v6 integration — no API key needed, but session auth uses your admin password. Leave pihole_base_url empty to disable Pi-hole view and DNS spike alerts.
_pihole_password_comment: Pi-hole v6 admin password used for POST /api/auth. This is intentionally a placeholder only — set your real password locally, not in git.
_dns_spike_comment: Alert when any device sends more than this many DNS queries in one poll period (~60s). 300 = 5 q/s sustained.
_enable_bot_comment: Set to false to run Pi.Alert/Pi-hole network monitor only — no Groq API key or Meshtastic device required. Anomalies are logged to console instead of sent via mesh DM.
_mitm_comment: Bettercap MITM test settings — configure via the settings portal at :8080. Target should be a device you own (phone/laptop). Toggle MITM on/off with Joystick LEFT while in Bettercap mode.
_ip_forward_comment: Set true to persist net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 across reboots via /etc/sysctl.d/. Needed for NAT, routing, or any feature requiring IP forwarding at all times. MITM mode manages this automatically while active.
_telemetry_comment: Monitor a specific Meshtastic node for environment telemetry. Sends DM alerts to alert_node(s) when thresholds are crossed. Leave telemetry_monitor_node blank to disable.
